title: Uniquely Crispy Syrian Ovoli Mushroom Kebabs
description: A crispy and adventurous Syrian dish featuring ovoli mushrooms, a sweet and tangy glaze, and anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients, perfect for a dinner or snack
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, pomegranate molasses, garlic, sumac, salt, and black pepper.
Add the ovoli mushrooms to the bowl and toss to coat with the glaze.
Thread the mushrooms onto skewers, leaving a small space between each mushroom.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the kebabs for 20 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly browned.
Increase the oven temperature to broil and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the mushrooms are crispy.
Remove the kebabs from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
